ddls:
CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the dataset belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "data_type" INTEGER /* Type of data in the dataset (e.g., numerical, categorical) */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was uploaded */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the dataset */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the dataset file (e.g., in MB) */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset (e.g., API, CSV upload) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the dataset (e.g., active, archived) */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was last modified */,
  "version_control" INTEGER /* Whether version control is enabled for the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_data_type FOREIGN KEY ("data_type") REFERENCES data_types ("data_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the project */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the project was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., active, archived) */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the project was last modified */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the project started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the project is expected to end */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "data_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the dataset */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the version was updated */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who updated the version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the dataset version (e.g., draft, published) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the result belongs to */,
  "analysis_type" INTEGER /* Type of analysis performed (e.g., mean, standard deviation) */,
  "result_date" TEXT /* Date the result was generated */,
  "result" TEXT /* The result of the analysis */,
  "analysis_description" TEXT /* Description of the analysis performed */,
  "analysis_parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used in the analysis (e.g., confidence level for confidence interval) */,
  "result_status" TEXT /* Status of the result (e.g., pending, completed, error) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_results_analysis_type FOREIGN KEY ("analysis_type") REFERENCES analysis_types ("analysis_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_results_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_types" (
  "analysis_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis type */,
  "analysis_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the analysis type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the analysis type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the permission belongs to */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the permission is for */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  "permission_status" TEXT /* Status of the permission (e.g., active, revoked) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality metric */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the quality metric belongs to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the quality metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the quality metric */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date the quality metric was evaluated */,
  "metric_status" TEXT /* Status of the quality metric (e.g., passing, failing) */,
  "metric_description" TEXT /* Description of the quality metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the collaboration belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user participating in the collaboration */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the collaboration */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the collaboration */,
  "collaboration_status" TEXT /* Status of the collaboration (e.g., active, pending, terminated) */,
  "collaboration_description" TEXT /* Description of the collaboration role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity performed */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date the activity was performed */,
  "activity_details" TEXT /* Details of the activity */,
  "activity_status" TEXT /* Status of the activity (e.g., success, error) */,
  "activity_description" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "extracts" (
  "extract_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each extract */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the extract belongs to */,
  "extract_type" INTEGER /* Type of extract (e.g., mean, standard deviation) */,
  "extract_value" REAL /* Value of the extract */,
  "extract_date" TEXT /* Date the extract was generated */,
  "extract_description" TEXT /* Description of the extract */,
  "extract_status" TEXT /* Status of the extract (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("extract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_extracts_extract_type FOREIGN KEY ("extract_type") REFERENCES extract_types ("extract_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_extracts_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "extract_types" (
  "extract_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each extract type */,
  "extract_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the extract type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the extract type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("extract_type_id")
)
